title: The Adventures of Mighty Plumber
description: Mighty Plumber to the rescue! Faster than a speeding plunger. More powerful than a pipe wrench! Able to snag disgusting drain clogs with a flick of the wrist.
parent: The Adventures of Super Mario Bros. 3.
altHero: Mighty Plumber, a man with a fedora, swinging a plunger
alt1: a woman flailing in a flooded kitchen
alt2: woman screaming as a giant sewage monster stands behind her
alt3: Mighty Plumber swinging through a kitchen
alt4: Mighty Plumber standing on the giant sewage monster that is tied up
